name: Colombier Acquisition Corp. III
business: We are a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.

exposures.sentence: While not limited to these sectors, we anticipate identifying and investing in high-growth opportunities in software, artificial intelligence, semiconductors, quantum computing, robotics, defense tech, DeFi, prediction markets, fintech, domestic manufacturing, rare earth minerals, energy & power generation, space, and digital infrastructure.
